'''âch-dh-n-s''' ('''kachadhnesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woll|woll]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woll|woll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-dh-n-s
|-
! Lemma
| kachadhnesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadhnesoko|thichadhnesoko]] || [[word:jichadhnesoko|jichadhnesoko]] || [[word:shichadhnesoko|shichadhnesoko]] || [[word:kichadhnesoko|kichadhnesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadhnesoko|thuthuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:jujuchadhnesoko|jujuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:shushuchadhnesoko|shushuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:kukuchadhnesoko|kukuchadhnesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadhnesoko|thuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:juchadhnesoko|juchadhnesoko]] || [[word:shuchadhnesoko|shuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:kuchadhnesoko|kuchadhnesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadhnesoko|thuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:juchadhnesoko|juchadhnesoko]] || [[word:shuchadhnesoko|shuchadhnesoko]] || [[word:kuchadhnesoko|kuchadhnesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadhnesoko|thochadhnesoko]] || [[word:jochadhnesoko|jochadhnesoko]] || [[word:shochadhnesoko|shochadhnesoko]] || [[word:kochadhnesoko|kochadhnesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchadhnesoko|thĂŠchadhnesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠchadhnesoko|jĂŠchadhnesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠchadhnesoko|shĂŠchadhnesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠchadhnesoko|kĂŠchadhnesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadhnesoko|thachadhnesoko]] || [[word:jachadhnesoko|jachadhnesoko]] || [[word:shachadhnesoko|shachadhnesoko]] || [[word:kachadhnesoko|kachadhnesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadhnesoko|thachadhnesoko]] || [[word:jachadhnesoko|jachadhnesoko]] || [[word:shachadhnesoko|shachadhnesoko]] || [[word:kachadhnesoko|kachadhnesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
